steps.title: Identify the dimensions
steps.content: The prism has height $9$ inches and base length $x$ inches. Since the length is $7$ inches more than the width, the width is $x-7$ inches.

steps.title: Use the volume formula
steps.content: Volume is length times width times height: $$V(x)=x(x-7)(9).$$ Reordering the factors gives $$V(x)=9x(x-7).$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: $V(x)=9x(x-7)$, so D is correct. Using $x+7$, which reverses the relationship between length and width.
